ItacPersonItem.Notes: See La Barriera fatta in Padova per il Carnevale del 1605 descritta dall`Ingenuo Accademico Ordito (Padova: Pasquati 1605). Maylender believes he is Annibale Orsato while the Union Catalogue of South West Germany mentions Ruberto Obizzi as the person involved in the publication. The South West German Catalogue seems to have the only copy of this book.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
